color.grading_style: 클린 앤 내추럴, 리프트된 블랙, 아날로그 감성

texture.detail_rendering: 다양한 재질감(주물, 나무, 천)이 사실적으로 표현됨

improvement_notes: 조명: 그리드나 스팟 조명을 사용하여 드라마틱한 효과 추가. 색감: 그림자에 틸/블루 톤을 추가하여 컬러 콘트라스트 활용. 구도: 손이나 김과 같은 요소를 추가하여 스토리텔링 강화.
nano_banana_prompt:
/imagine prompt: A high-end commercial food photograph of [YOUR FOOD HERE], minimalist and rustic styling. The scene is set on a dark, textured wooden surface with a matte black ceramic bowl and simple brass cutlery.

**Photography Style:** Shot with a 100mm macro lens at a 45-degree angle, shallow depth of field (f/5.6), focus locked on the main ingredient.

**Lighting:** Professional studio lighting. A large, diffused softbox from the left-back (10 o'clock position) creates soft, dimensional light. A white reflector on the right-front (4 o'clock position) gently fills in the shadows, creating a low-contrast, bright, and airy mood.

**Color & Mood:** Color graded in the style of Kodak Portra 400 film. Features a warm overall tone, natural saturation, clean off-white background, and slightly lifted blacks for a soft, analog feel. The color palette is dominated by warm browns, blacks, and the natural colors of the food.

**Details:** Hyper-detailed, tack sharp, appetizing, clean aesthetic, high resolution, professional food photography --ar 16:9 --style raw
